_doc: Synthetic fixtures for export-pdf-wrongthread-parallel. Save Document as PDF faults with InvalidCastException / RPC_E_WRONG_THREAD (0x8001010E) because a Parallel between scope-open and the export runs the export on a non-creator thread, off the STA that owns the document. The stack trace includes the Parallel frame; the run is attended/foreground with no external Word, isolating the threading-construct cause to the workflow source.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key e5f6a7b8-c9d0-4b3c-9e5f-607182930415 --state Faulted --output json
or jobs logs f6a7b8c9-d0e1-4c4d-8f60-718293041526 --level Error --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.
